positive: Stylized minimalist geometric forest landscape, featuring interlocking hexagonal shapes forming abstract trees, glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, and meandering river paths. The design should have a high-contrast silhouette look with solid black foreground elements against a soft, gradient pastel blue and jade green background. Use a flat graphic design style with clean lines and crisp edges, evoking a sense of magical depth. Composition should be perfectly centered for apparel printing, ensuring all elements are easily visible and scalable. Emphasis on negative space and strong pattern repeat potential. Vector graphic aesthetic, clean cut.
